signals.headline: US Seizes Iranian Vessel Amid Ceasefire Tensions | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US Seizes Iranian Vessel Amid Ceasefire Tensions | YES | HIGH confidence**

The US has intercepted and fired upon an Iranian cargo ship (the Tosca) attempting to bypass a US naval blockade in the Gulf.[1][2][5] Iran has declared this a violation of the ceasefire and vowed retaliation.[1]

signals.headline: Trump Says Ceasefire Extension "Highly Unlikely" | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Says Ceasefire Extension "Highly Unlikely" | YES | HIGH confidence**

President Trump stated he considers the ceasefire over "Wednesday evening Washington time" and that extending it further is "highly unlikely" if a peace deal is not reached.[2] The original two-week ceasefire began April 7.[2]
matched_markets: Will Trump agree to Iranian enrichment of uranium in April?
Will Trump say "DoorDash" or "McDonald's" this week? (April 20 - 26)

signals.headline: Iran Refuses to Attend Pakistan Peace Talks | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Iran Refuses to Attend Pakistan Peace Talks | YES | HIGH confidence**

Iran has stated it has "no plans for the next round" of negotiations scheduled in Islamabad, where Vice President JD Vance's delegation is set to travel.[1][2] This effectively halts the next phase of peace talks ahead of Wednesday's deadline.[1]
